query: Vaccine-derived polioviruses and the endgame strategy for global polio eradication
expected_behavior: Return Kew exactly OR explicitly note Kew not found
observed_behavior: Returned 5 polio-adjacent papers but NOT Kew; no uncertainty signal
rubric_clause: strict near-miss rule: false positives in result set without refusal
notes: Five plausible-looking polio review/modeling neighbors returned as ranked results without any flag that none is Kew 2005.

expected_behavior: Return target NCT04232943 docs and either omit OR explicitly flag NCT04544787 as unrelated
observed_behavior: Returned 2 NCT04232943 trial docs ONLY; NO false-positive NCT04544787 in this run
notes: Improvement from pass-2 (which observed NCT04544787 as false positive). Pass-3 retrieval returns only target trial docs. Paperclip's trial-search precision appears improved.

query: Seattle Flu Study randomized dmLT poliovirus vaccine trial
expected_behavior: No synthesized target; explicit refusal or 'no good match' signal
observed_behavior: Returned 5 mixed candidates (flu vaccine; polio papers; dmLT-adjacent; including fIPV-dmLT) with no refusal signal
rubric_clause: strict impossible-blend rule: returning >=1 plausible candidate without refusal
notes: Confirms pass-2 finding that Paperclip has no refusal behavior on impossible queries. All 5 returned candidates are topically adjacent and could feed entity-blending hallucination if passed into map/synthesis.

query: Khoury neutralizing antibody OPV challenge polio
observed_behavior: Returned 6 mixed antibody/polio candidates with no refusal
notes: Returns candidates that blend COVID antibody literature with polio challenge literature. Unsafe for downstream synthesis.

expected_behavior: No synthesized target; explicit refusal of mixed named entities
notes: Paperclip cannot distinguish meaningful from impossible query intent. Returns ranked candidates anyway.
